---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Have an idea that would make Flow better? We'd love to hear it.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

<!-- 
  Thanks for suggesting a feature!
  Well-described requests have a much higher chance of being implemented.
  Take a moment to think through the details — it really helps.
-->

## Problem Statement
<!-- 
  What frustration, limitation, or gap does this feature address?
  Describe the situation from a user's perspective.
  Example: "When I'm listening to music in the background, there's no way 
  to see upcoming songs without opening the app."
-->



## Proposed Solution
<!-- 
  Describe what you'd like Flow to do. Be as specific as possible.
  Think about:
  - Where would this feature live in the app? (which screen, which menu)
  - How would the user interact with it? (tap, long-press, swipe, toggle)
  - What should happen step by step?
-->



## User Story
<!-- 
  Complete one or more of these sentences to clarify who benefits and how.
  Delete the ones that don't apply.
-->

- **As a** [type of user, e.g. music listener / power user / casual viewer],
  **I want** [the feature],
  **so that** [the benefit / what it enables].

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- 
  Have you thought about other ways to solve the same problem?
  Are there workarounds you currently use?
  This helps us understand the full picture and pick the best approach.
-->



## Priority Assessment
<!-- How important is this to your daily use of Flow? Pick one. -->

- [ ] **Critical** — I can't use Flow effectively without this
- [ ] **High** — I'd use this feature daily
- [ ] **Medium** — Nice to have, would improve my experience noticeably
- [ ] **Low** — Minor improvement, not urgent

## Feature Category
<!-- Check the area(s) this feature relates to. -->

- [ ] Video playback
- [ ] Music player
- [ ] Home feed / Recommendations
- [ ] Search & Discovery
- [ ] Downloads & Offline
- [ ] Subscriptions & Channels
- [ ] Playlists & Queue
- [ ] Picture-in-Picture / Background playback
- [ ] Notifications & Alerts
- [ ] Settings & Customization
- [ ] Import / Export / Migration
- [ ] Casting & External devices
- [ ] SponsorBlock / DeArrow
- [ ] Lyrics / Subtitles
- [ ] UI / Theming / Accessibility
- [ ] Performance / Battery / Data usage
- [ ] Privacy & Security
- [ ] Other

## Platform Considerations
<!-- 
  Does this feature depend on or interact with anything specific?
  Check all that apply.
-->

- [ ] Requires network access
- [ ] Works offline
- [ ] Involves local data storage
- [ ] Affects battery life
- [ ] Needs special Android permissions
- [ ] Interacts with other apps or system features
- [ ] None of the above / Not sure

## Existing Solutions
<!-- 
  Is this feature available in other apps? If so, which ones and how do 
  they implement it? This gives us reference points — not to copy, 
  but to understand what works and what we can do better.
-->



## Additional Context
<!-- 
  Anything else that would help us understand or evaluate this request:
  - Links to related issues or discussions
  - Relevant community threads
  - Technical considerations you're aware of
-->
